headline: Stable negative sentiment (score: -60.1)
key_insights: Fears trending up 51% over 7 days (strong momentum)
sentiment_commentary:
• Frustrations dominate with 141 quotes, including 106 at strong intensity - people are expressing serious anger and annoyance today.
• Despite the high quote volume, the frustration score dropped significantly from yesterday's near-peak levels, suggesting the intensity per quote was lower.
• Both fears and optimism remain well below average, with fears taking a notable dive from yesterday's positive territory.
methodology: See METHODOLOGY.md. Scores use z-score normalization with empirically-derived intensity weights from analytics_config.yaml. Alerts at |z| >= threshold (configurable, default 2.0 for p < 0.05).
